S.FORM: Harold Bower kawas tay 1912, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 3, Harold Bower, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1992) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ńßarol* ő≤ower kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ńßarol* ő≤ower, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. (mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
